boq.description: Permits, setting out, temporary services, site offices
Insurance, compliance, security, HSE controls
Clearing, grubbing, bulk earthworks and compaction
Stormwater, soakaways and external drainage
Excavations, anti-termite treatment and cart-away
Reinforced concrete strip and pad foundations
Ground slab, damp proofing and mesh reinforcement
Brick/block walls including lintels and wall ties
Reinforced concrete columns, beams and ring beams
Structural steel feature supports and fixings
Timber/steel trusses, bracing and roof framing
Roof covering, insulation, flashings and gutters
Aluminium windows and external glazed doors
Main entrance, garage doors and security ironmongery
Floor screeds, porcelain tiles and skirtings
Ceilings, bulkheads and cornices
Internal doors, wardrobes and joinery allowance
Painting, wall finishes and decorative coatings
Kitchen cabinetry, countertops and appliances allowance
Sanitaryware, vanities, mixers and accessories
Electrical reticulation, DBs, lighting and power points
Plumbing, hot water systems and pressure pumps
HVAC and ventilation allowance
Data, CCTV, access control and smart-home rough-in
Driveway paving, walkways and apron slabs
Boundary works, gates and perimeter lighting allowance
Landscaping, irrigation and final clean
Testing, inspections, as-builts and handover manuals

materials.margin_control: Reconcile daily plant hours to fuel slips.
Lock pour rates before foundation and slab sequence starts.
No cutting list release without engineer-approved drawings.
Weekly cement reconciliation against masonry and plaster output.
Shop drawings approved before fabrication deposit.
Confirm colour, gauge, coating warranty and wastage before order.
Site measure after openings; client approval on finish before deposit.
Client upgrades are variation orders, not contingency drawdowns.
Approve paint schedule and sample wall before bulk purchase.
Signed shop drawings and appliance list before manufacture.

materials.material: Electrical cable, DBs, conduits and fittings
materials.margin_control: Material issue sheets matched to room-by-room point schedule.
Client-selected fittings beyond allowance require signed VO.

materials.material: Plumbing pipes, valves, pumps and tanks
materials.margin_control: Pressure-test before covering; supplier warranty captured.
Finish/spec changes after order are client cost.
Reject off-colour batches; measure installed area weekly.

materials.material: Boundary gate automation and external lights

schedule_scenarios.assumptions: Drawings frozen before mobilisation, clean site, fast inspections, client decisions on time, long-lead suppliers locked by week 3, stable weather and no abnormal ground.
schedule_scenarios.commercial_position: Do not discount the contract price for finishing early. Early completion protects overhead and gives capacity back to the business.

schedule_scenarios.assumptions: Normal approvals, normal supplier lead times, manageable weather, standard rework allowance, client decisions made by the decision schedule.
schedule_scenarios.commercial_position: Base quotation programme. Margin remains protected if spend follows the weekly cost ceiling and variations are signed before execution.

schedule_scenarios.assumptions: Late drawings, slow client finish decisions, one authority inspection delay, supplier slippage on glazing/joinery, weather disruption and moderate productivity loss.
schedule_scenarios.commercial_position: Issue delay notices and variation orders. Unrecoverable delay overhead beyond 36 weeks reduces gross profit unless recovered from the client.

schedule_drivers.best_case: All IFC drawings, structural details and MEP layouts approved before week 1.
schedule_drivers.expected_case: Minor clarifications handled through RFIs without stopping work.
schedule_drivers.delay_case: Missing details stop procurement/site work and create rework risk.
schedule_drivers.margin_response: No work from sketch or verbal instruction. Price drawing changes as variation orders.

schedule_drivers.best_case: Clean access, normal soil, no hidden services, no boundary dispute.
schedule_drivers.expected_case: Minor ground adjustments handled inside measured BOQ quantities.
schedule_drivers.delay_case: Rock, groundwater, soft spots, hidden services or access restrictions appear.
schedule_drivers.margin_response: Stop, measure, photograph, engineer instruction, price before proceeding.

schedule_drivers.best_case: Permits and inspections happen on first booked dates.
schedule_drivers.expected_case: One or two inspection comments corrected without critical delay.
schedule_drivers.delay_case: Permit, foundation, drainage, electrical or occupation approvals slip.
schedule_drivers.margin_response: Separate contractor delay from authority delay; claim EOT and standing cost where allowed.

schedule_drivers.best_case: Core trades available on planned dates with stable productivity.
schedule_drivers.expected_case: Some trade overlap requires zone control but remains manageable.
schedule_drivers.delay_case: Absenteeism, congestion, rework or subcontractor underperformance slows output.
schedule_drivers.margin_response: Daily production review. Add crews/overtime only through approved recovery budget.

schedule_drivers.best_case: Glazing, roof, joinery, sanitaryware and electrical packages ordered before expiry.
schedule_drivers.expected_case: Normal supplier slippage absorbed through resequencing.
schedule_drivers.delay_case: Late or wrong-spec delivery blocks follow-on trades.
schedule_drivers.margin_response: Use quote expiry tracker, backup supplier and back-charge/variation route.

schedule_drivers.best_case: Finishes, kitchen, lighting, tiles and sanitaryware approved by decision schedule.
schedule_drivers.expected_case: Some choices are late but within procurement float.
schedule_drivers.delay_case: Client upgrades or indecision affects procurement and completion.
schedule_drivers.margin_response: Late decisions become time and cost variations. No free acceleration.

schedule_drivers.best_case: Dry conditions through earthworks, roof and external works.
schedule_drivers.expected_case: Normal rain disruption contained within float.
schedule_drivers.delay_case: Heavy rain delays earthworks, roofing, paving or landscaping.
schedule_drivers.margin_response: Weather diary, photos, EOT notice and resequencing. Do not absorb abnormal delay.

months.deliverables: Permits, setting out, procurement baseline, site establishment
Ground slab, columns, beams, masonry to wall plate
Roof structure, covering, windows and external doors
Electrical, plumbing, HVAC first fix, plastering, screeds
Ceilings, tiling, joinery manufacture, painting first coats
Kitchen, bathrooms, paving, boundary works, services testing
MEP commissioning, snag closure, landscaping, authority inspections
Final clean, manuals, as-builts, client training, occupation support
